### `status`

integer | array of integer

The current status of this request. Possible values are: (1): Awaiting processing in queue., (2): Item processed successfully., (3): Item encountered an error while processing., (4): Item is currently being processed., (5): Item failed processing, but will be retried., (6): Item failed validity tests., (7): There was insufficient metadata to complete the task.

Choices (7):

| Value | Label |
|---|---|
| `1` | Awaiting processing in queue. |
| `2` | Item processed successfully. |
| `3` | Item encountered an error while processing. |
| `4` | Item is currently being processed. |
| `5` | Item failed processing, but will be retried. |
| `6` | Item failed validity tests. |
| `7` | There was insufficient metadata to complete the task. |
